description: Phase V campaign phase5-su2-branch-refinement-env-validation — positive evidence dossier

provenance.notes: Phase IX standard evidence campaign: multi-variant admitted atlas on the same strict thresholds, bridge-derived convergence sourced from multiple admitted backgrounds, unchanged benchmark separation, and candidate-specific escalation that still fails closed when candidate-linked branch/background provenance is absent.
